g.text: temp[2 * BLOCK_SIZE] - Shared Memory Virtual View

div.p: Problem: Threads accessing temp[tid*2] hit the same bank every 16 threads at higher offsets.

g.text: Conflict: Offset > 1 maps to same bank

div.p: Solution: Shift all logic indices by +BLOCK_SIZE. The strided access now maps to distinct banks.

text.tspan: // Bank Conflict Free Access via BLOCK_SIZE Offset
// Bank Conflict Free Access via BLOCK_SIZE Offset
